forecast.description: Auto-promote if MAPE improves by 1% or more

inventory.description: Auto-promote if R² improves by 0.5% or more

recommendations.description: Auto-promote if avg confidence improves by 2% or more

data.description: Require minimum 90 days of data for retraining

cleanup.description: Keep only the 5 most recent model versions

schedule.description: Retraining frequency for each model type
